description.ko: AQUA-5와 함께 바다의 미개척 심해로 여행을 떠나보세요. 극한의 수압을 견디도록 설계된 이 잠수정은 심해의 미스터리를 발견하기 위한 첨단 생물 발광 내비게이션과 고해상도 음파 탐지기를 갖추고 있습니다.
description.en: Journey into the uncharted depths of the ocean with AQUA-5. Engineered to withstand extreme pressure, this submersible features advanced bioluminescent navigation and high-definition sonar for discovering the mysteries of the abyss.

prompt: High-tech futuristic submarine drone AQUA-5 navigating through the midnight zone of the deep ocean, surrounded by bioluminescent jellyfish and glowing aquatic flora, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, deep navy blue and neon cyan color palette, detailed metallic textures, underwater volcanic vents in the background.
